[Image: architecture.png] (image/png, 184.3KB)
Description: A system architecture diagram. Shows a three-tier layout: frontend (web + mobile) at the top, an API gateway middle tier with auth + rate-limiting, and a backend tier with PostgreSQL, Redis, and an async worker pool. Arrows indicate request flow. Labels include 'CDN', 'Load Balancer', 'Session Store', 'Worker Queue'.
Detected content keywords: architecture diagram.

[Image: gpu_temp_graph.png] (image/png, 94.6KB)
Description: A line chart showing GPU temperature over an 8-hour training run. Temperature starts at 45°C, rises to 78°C during peak training, and plateaus around 74°C. A horizontal red line at 85°C marks the throttling threshold.
Detected content keywords: gpu temperature time-series graph.

Detected content keywords: crash stack trace screenshot.

[Image: confusion_matrix.png] (image/png, 41.5KB)
Description: A 4x4 confusion matrix visualization. Classes are 'bug', 'feature', 'chore', 'doc'. Diagonal cells are dark green (high accuracy). Off-diagonal cells are mostly pale; the darkest misclassification cell is 'chore' predicted as 'feature' with 12 cases.
Detected content keywords: confusion matrix.

[Image: benchmark.jpeg] (image/jpeg, 88.2KB)
Description: A grouped bar chart comparing three LLMs across four benchmark tasks (MMLU, GSM8K, HumanEval, ARC). Each bar shows the score with a small error bar. The legend identifies the three models by color. The fine-tuned model wins on GSM8K and HumanEval.
Detected content keywords: benchmark comparison chart.
data:image/jpeg;base64,/9j/4AAQSkZJRgABAQAA... (truncated; benchmark result table as an image screenshot, MMLU/ARC/HellaSwag columns)

[Image: architecture-v2.png] (image/png, 167.0KB)
Description: A revised version of a system architecture diagram. Differences from v1: a new 'event bus' tier has been added between the API gateway and backend; the worker pool is now partitioned by region; the caching layer now shows both Redis and CDN edges. Same three-tier skeleton but more detail on async paths.
Detected content keywords: architecture diagram v2 revised.
data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgo... (truncated; updated architecture diagram replacing single-tier router with the 3-tier cascade)

[Image: error_dialog.png] (image/png, 18.5KB)
Description: A modal error dialog. Title: 'Unable to connect'. Body: 'We could not reach the server. Check your internet connection and try again.' A primary 'Retry' button and a secondary 'Cancel' button are at the bottom.
Detected content keywords: error dialog modal screenshot.
data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgo... (truncated; small macOS error dialog reading 'Permission denied: ./run.sh')

[Image: grafana_panel.png] (image/png, 139.2KB)
Description: A Grafana dashboard panel showing request-latency percentiles. Four lines: p50 (20ms), p90 (45ms), p95 (62ms), p99 (180ms). A red threshold line at 200ms is not breached. Time range is the last 6 hours. Annotation markers indicate two deploy events.
Detected content keywords: grafana observability panel.
data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgo... (truncated; Grafana time-series panel of auth_refresh_rejected_total showing a 73-minute spike on 2026-04-08)
